title: walsura sumatrana
intro: Walsura sumatrana, also known as Sumatran walsura, is a plant species in the family Sapotaceae, native to Indonesia and Malaysia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities, which are attributed to the presence of various bioactive compounds such as alkaloids and terpenoids. The health benefits of Walsura sumatrana include its potential in treating various conditions such as fever, cough, and digestive issues, as well as its ability to boost the immune system and reduce inflammation. In traditional medicine, Walsura sumatrana is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, where the dried roots and leaves are steeped in hot water to create a medicinal tea.
